title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management B2B SaaS company with offices in Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale its go-to-market engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, including the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Omri is a perfect match for this Head of RevOps role: 15+ years in B2B SaaS exceeds the 7+ requirement, his expertise in Salesforce administration and pipeline forecasting directly align with the revenue analytics focus, and the Fintech/B2B SaaS background mirrors Finout's cloud cost management positioning. The Tel Aviv/New York hybrid structure perfectly accommodates his location preferences.
ai_opener: I've been following Finout's growth in the cloud cost management space, and your approach to building a scalable GTM engine resonates deeply with my experience scaling RevOps organizations through high-growth phases. With 15+ years in B2B SaaS—including hands-on Salesforce administration, pipeline forecasting, and cross-functional leadership across sales, marketing, and finance—I've consistently built revenue operations functions that drive predictable growth beyond $30M ARR. Given your Tel Aviv HQ and my location flexibility in the area, I'd love to explore how I can help Finout build the operational backbone for your next growth phase.
